title: Use of English - Test 1
explanation:
Use of English - B2 Test 1

Mixed grammar and vocabulary review.

questions.text: Never before [*have I|I have|did I] seen such an enthusiastic audience.
You [*should have backed|should back|must back] up the files before the update.
It was the CEO who [*made|did|had] the final decision.
The report is believed [*to contain|containing|contain] several inaccuracies.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The government introduced new legislation on data ____.  | *protection | protect | protective
Rising inflation has affected household ____.  | *budgets | budgeting | budgeted
The witness was asked ____ in court. | *to testify | testify | testifying
The museum's latest ____ opens on Friday. | *exhibition | exhibit | exhibited
She had her car [*serviced|service|servicing] at the garage.
I enjoy hiking, and so [*do|am|have] my friends.
It is essential that he [*be|is|was] present at the meeting.
[*What|That|Which] worries me most is the lack of transparency.
